regulatoryStatus: Authorized gold-backed virtual currency / gold-backed digital asset issued by Paxos Trust Company, N.A.; originally authorized by NYDFS for Paxos Trust Company LLC and later supported by OCC conditional approval for Paxos Trust Company, National Association.
primaryRegulator: Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC); New York State Department of Financial Services (NYDFS) authorization at launch
regulatoryFramework: OCC-regulated national trust bank framework; NYDFS virtual currency / limited purpose trust company authorization; Paxos AML/KYC program; OFAC sanctions screening; customer identification program
amlPolicy: Paxos maintains an AML/KYC program with internal controls, independent AML testing, a designated compliance officer, employee AML training, customer identification procedures, OFAC and government watchlist screening, identity verification, beneficial-owner checks for institutions, customer due diligence, and transaction monitoring.
